sources.label: NHS confirmation page
rejected: terminal-success layout because this route remains actively manageable

sources.label: NHS check answers
borrowed: compact summary-list structure for appointment and capability facts
rejected: full review-before-submit page framing because this route is an ongoing workspace

sources.label: NHS interruption page
borrowed: reserved use of interruption styling for repair or blocked trust states
rejected: full-page stop treatment for ordinary blocked manage because the appointment context must remain visible

sources.label: NHS App web integration
rejected: desktop-only composition or header dependency that would break in embedded mode

sources.label: WAI APG disclosure pattern
borrowed: button-led disclosure with explicit expanded state for timeline rows

sources.label: WAI APG modal dialog example
borrowed: existing mission-stack dialog semantics for folded rail detail
rejected: new custom modal system for this route

sources.label: WCAG status messages
borrowed: polite live-region treatment for same-shell settlement announcements
rejected: visual-only state changes without spoken feedback

sources.label: WCAG reflow
borrowed: single-column mobile collapse with no horizontal dependence
rejected: two-dimensional scrolling for summary or timeline review

sources.label: WCAG focus not obscured
borrowed: sticky tray reserve and focus visibility testing
rejected: floating action posture that hides focused controls

sources.label: Playwright best practices
borrowed: user-facing assertions and no external-request expectation
rejected: implementation-detail selectors as the primary proof mechanism

sources.label: Playwright aria snapshots
borrowed: accessible tree capture for route-level proof

sources.label: Playwright visual comparisons
borrowed: repeatable visual baseline posture for desktop, mobile, and atlas views
rejected: pixel-only approval without layout or semantic checks

sources.label: Playwright trace viewer
borrowed: trace-ready debugging posture for interactive proof runs
rejected: manual visual debugging as the only regression method

sources.label: Linear redesign article
borrowed: low-noise panel hierarchy and restrained chrome
rejected: dense app-level chrome or product-specific stylistic mimicry

sources.label: Linear conceptual model
borrowed: action consistency and concise workspace hierarchy as secondary inspiration
rejected: issue-tracker interaction patterns that would make the route feel like an ops console
